title: My Simple Claude Cowork System (for normal people)
summary: Jeff Su presents Claude Cowork, a workspace architecture that transforms Claude into a full operating system for work productivity. The system uses instruction files, persistent memory, a three-level hierarchy of workstations and projects, and structured templates for tasks like email management and content creation.
